version.about_text:
{app_name}
Version: {version}
Author: {author}

A Nuclei-based vulnerability scanning GUI tool:
• POC management and editing
• FOFA/Hunter/Shodan asset search
• AI-assisted analysis
• Scan history management
• Vulnerability report generation
• Task queue (priority, resume)
• Vulnerability trend analysis
• Proxy pool management
• Performance monitoring

GitHub: https://github.com/your-repo/nuclei-gui
storage.no_secure_backend: No secure backend found, using base64 (insecure)
settings.oast.adapt_legacy: Adapt legacy DNSLog placeholders such as {{dnslog}} and {{callback_url}}
settings.oast.hint: Auto mode enables Interactsh only when selected POCs use OAST/DNSLog variables.

oast.legacy_not_adapted: Legacy DNSLog placeholders were detected, but legacy adaptation is disabled.
oast.disabled_for_templates: OAST/DNSLog is disabled; {count} OAST template(s) may not be verified.
